revenue: $2.73 billion in Q2 2025 (6-month revenue up 3.6% YoY to $5.32 billion)
net_income: $368 million in Q2 2025, up 64.3% YoY from $224 million
key_metrics: Income from Operations: $484 million in Q2 2025 (down 11.8% YoY)
qoq_changes: Revenue increased sequentially to $2.73 billion in Q2 2025 from an implied $2.59 billion in Q1 2025
Net income decreased sequentially to $368 million in Q2 2025 from an implied $503 million in Q1 2025
Cash and short-term investments declined to $3.75 billion from $5.89 billion at year-end 2024
new_risks: Macroeconomic headwinds including persistent inflationary pressure and elevated interest rates
Geopolitical instability, specifically citing ongoing wars in Ukraine and the Middle East
Uncertainty surrounding international trade relations, global regulations, and changing tariff policies
management_tone: Neutral to cautious, as management balances solid bottom-line growth against declining operating income and persistent macroeconomic and geopolitical uncertainties.
analyst_note: eBay's Q2 2025 results show strong net income growth driven by reduced losses on equity investments, masking an 11.8% YoY decline in operating income. Investors should monitor the impact of rising operating expenses and macroeconomic pressures on core marketplace profitability.
